channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-03-14 06:04 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: Common sense. A simple test for immigrants is: would you enjoy working them. If so, they would be an...
item.description: Common sense. A simple test for immigrants is: would you enjoy working them. If so, they would be an asset to America.

item.title: @elonmusk: xAI is really strong on price to performance grok 4.20 (beta) is opus 4.5 level with significantly f...
item.description: xAI is really strong on price to performance grok 4.20 (beta) is opus 4.5 level with significantly faster inference, significantly lower cost, and a lower hallucination rate opus 4.5 costs $5 input and $25 output per million tokens, while grok 4.20 costs $2 and $6

item.title: @elonmusk: 🚨🇺🇸 VP Vance nails it: "If illegals voting is so rare, why not ban it anyway?" Crystal clear logic, ...
item.description: 🚨🇺🇸 VP Vance nails it: "If illegals voting is so rare, why not ban it anyway?" Crystal clear logic, right? But nah, the Senate's the real clown show. It's not sense they're missing, it's good faith. Who's even buying their excuses?

item.title: @elonmusk: To Save Time, CNN Will Now Run Retractions Simultaneously With News Storiesbuff.ly/qEWLcI1
item.description: To Save Time, CNN Will Now Run Retractions Simultaneously With News Storiesbuff.ly/qEWLcI1

item.title: @elonmusk: Starlink providing reliable connectivity in Zimbabwe 🛰️❤️
item.description: Starlink providing reliable connectivity in Zimbabwe 🛰️❤️

item.title: @elonmusk: Only American citizens should be able to vote in our elections. Period. This shouldn't be controvers...
item.description: Only American citizens should be able to vote in our elections. Period. This shouldn't be controversial. If Democrats want to block something that the overwhelming majority of Americans agree with—be my guest. Pass the SAVE America Act NOW!

item.title: @elonmusk: Prufrock-3 launching off The Monster! The Monster tilts down, allowing the boring machine to mine di...
item.description: Prufrock-3 launching off The Monster! The Monster tilts down, allowing the boring machine to mine directly into the parking lot ground without any pit/shaft/excavation.

item.title: @elonmusk: The new Grok Imagine upgrade is pretty cool. 🔥
item.description: The new Grok Imagine upgrade is pretty cool. 🔥

item.title: @elonmusk: 🚨NEWS: Democrat Andy Thomson has won the Boca Raton mayoral race by just ONE vote. 🔵 Thomson — 7,568...
item.description: 🚨NEWS: Democrat Andy Thomson has won the Boca Raton mayoral race by just ONE vote. 🔵 Thomson — 7,568 🔴 Liebelson — 7,567 With 100% of votes in, Thomson becomes the first Democratic mayor of Boca Raton in over 30 years. One vote decided the election.

item.title: @elonmusk: Returning to the Moon will prepare us for the grand journey to Mars. If we get this right, we’ll see...
item.description: Returning to the Moon will prepare us for the grand journey to Mars. If we get this right, we’ll see the Stars and Stripes on the Red Planet in our lifetimes.🇺🇸 Thank you@C__Herridgefor having me on.

item.title: @elonmusk: Starlink's high-speed, low-latency internet is now available in Niue! 🛰️🇳🇺❤️ →starlink.com/niue
item.description: Starlink's high-speed, low-latency internet is now available in Niue! 🛰️🇳🇺❤️ →starlink.com/niue

item.title: @elonmusk: Elon Musk on the biggest danger of AI and robotics: “I think probably the biggest danger of AI or ma...
item.description: Elon Musk on the biggest danger of AI and robotics: “I think probably the biggest danger of AI or maybe the biggest danger of AI and robotics going wrong is government People who are opposed to corporations or worried about corporations should really worry the most about government. Government is just a corporation in the limit; it is the biggest corporation with a monopoly on violence The government could potentially use AI and robotics to suppress the population. That’s a serious concern” Elon says the real threat is Big Government armed with superintelligence

item.title: @elonmusk: The 1st century AD Roman Aqueduct of Segovia, in Spain, constructed from 20,400 granite blocks witho...
item.description: The 1st century AD Roman Aqueduct of Segovia, in Spain, constructed from 20,400 granite blocks without mortar. The bridge structure, which transported water 17 km from mountain springs to Segovia until 1973,

item.title: @elonmusk: Failing to pass SAVE is an act of high treason against the people of America
item.description: Failing to pass SAVE is an act of high treason against the people of America
